name: com.lvn.engine.services
description: Offline-first product-backend clients for the Elvin engine: server-authoritative wallet with a kill-safe offline queue, IAP verify, rewarded ads, analytics, daily rewards, leaderboards, device + Google/Apple platform auth, and a web-view seam. LvnServiceOps registers the script-facing ext ops (wallet_earn/spend, leaderboard_submit, daily_claim, ad_reward, track) so stories drive the economy from plain text. Talks to the repo's Go content server; every service degrades gracefully offline.

samples.description: External wiring that plugs gree/unity-webview into the LvnWebView seam for an in-app web view (store payment banner, ToS/Policy). Import gree/unity-webview first. The engine never links a web-view library.
